question: What is the honest status after 020-024?
answer: The apparatus found a permission frontier. It did not find an admission law.
frontier_statement: Gate readiness saturates; selector sharpness appears coupled; construction provenance exposes components but not the coupling; context patterns do not become permission.

closed_results.closed_result: All 71 deferred candidates passed gate-readiness qualification.
closed_results.keeper: Gate readiness is not permission. Permission requires admission.

closed_results.closed_result: No usable single structural selector isolated the admitted seed; 11 exact pair structural selectors were found.
closed_results.frontier: Permission sharpness appears coupled, not single-feature.
closed_results.keeper: Readiness finds the frontier. Sharpness asks what permission is for.

closed_results.closed_result: The least-sharp best admission hypothesis was role.AB=03_09 AND role.E=13.
closed_results.frontier: A selector can nominate permission but cannot grant it.
closed_results.keeper: A selector can nominate permission. It cannot grant it.

closed_results.closed_result: Selector components were construction-visible and co-visible, but exact coupled construction provenance was absent.
closed_results.frontier: The ledger knows the ingredients but does not yet explain the coupling.
closed_results.keeper: A selector nominates permission only if the construction can explain why it was allowed to select.

closed_results.closed_result: Broad context patterns were found, but no coupling law explained why 03_09 should select endpoint 13.
closed_results.keeper: Co-visibility is not coupling. Coupling is not permission until admitted.

next_forks.name: write_theorem_note
next_forks.description: Stop at the permission frontier and write a theorem-style note summarizing the plateau.

next_forks.name: expand_construction_language
next_forks.description: Add more construction-side fields and test whether a real coupling law appears.

next_forks.name: rebuild_candidate_generation_from_source_semantics
next_forks.description: Reconstruct candidate generation from source-side semantics rather than filtering after the fact.

next_forks.name: admit_family_by_new_axiom
next_forks.description: Admit a broader permission family by explicit new axiom.

interpretation.main: This is a real plateau, not a failure. The apparatus successfully refused to confuse readiness, selection, co-visibility, coupling, and permission.
interpretation.next_recommended: Write a theorem note or expand construction language before any admission act.
interpretation.forbidden_next_step: Do not admit the family merely because all deferred candidates are gate-ready.

keeper: The apparatus found a permission frontier. It did not find an admission law.
